<!-- Thank you! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first: PRs here follow the
reference-patch model — accepted changes are re-landed in the private
workshop (full test suite + live APIC walkthrough), your PR is closed with
the release that ships it, and you are credited in the CHANGELOG. -->

## What & why

<!-- The operational problem, then the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, real IPs/hostnames or sensitive DNs anywhere
- [ ] Focused, small diff matching the surrounding style
- [ ] Public docstrings for anything public (English, verbose)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or vocabulary changed
